title: Add adv_task_show tool to retrieve full task details by task ID

tasks.title: Add adv_task_show tool definition to plugin/src/tools/task.ts — takes taskId arg, calls store.tasks.get(), returns full Task + changeId. Handle 'Task Not Found' error.
tasks.completed_by: Added adv_task_show tool to task.ts and store.tasks.show() to store.ts. 3 new tests all passing.

red.output_snippet: FAIL src/tools/task.test.ts > Task Tools > adv_task_show > returns full task with changeId for existing task - TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'execute'). 3 failed | 32 passed (35)

green.output_snippet: Test Files 1 passed (1). Tests 35 passed (35). adv_task_show: returns full task with changeId, returns all task fields, returns error for nonexistent task - all passing.

tasks.title: Export adv_task_show in plugin/src/tools/index.ts
tasks.completed_by: No change needed — taskTools is already exported as a whole object from index.ts, adv_task_show is automatically included.

tdd_evidence.skip_reason: trivial: taskTools already exported as a single object from ./task — adv_task_show is automatically included. No code change needed.

tasks.title: Register adv_task_show in plugin/src/index.ts tool registration block
tasks.completed_by: Registered adv_task_show in plugin/src/index.ts tool block. tsc --noEmit clean, full test suite 403/407 pass (4 pre-existing archive failures).

tdd_evidence.skip_reason: trivial: tool registration follows exact same pattern as 8 other task tools — pure wiring, verified by tsc --noEmit and full test suite

tasks.title: Refactor: Extract resolveTask(taskId) helper in store.ts to DRY up the 6 methods that repeat the same 8-line task-resolution boilerplate (ensureAllChangesSynced → sqlite.tasks.get → loadChange → tasks.find). Have get, show, update, recordEvidence, setPhase, skipTdd all use it.
tasks.completed_by: Extracted resolveTask() helper in store.ts. 6 methods now use it. Net -69 lines. tsc clean, 35/35 tests pass.

red.output_snippet: Characterization tests baseline: 35 passed (35). Refactoring must preserve all behavior.

green.output_snippet: Test Files 1 passed (1). Tests 35 passed (35). All characterization tests pass after extracting resolveTask() helper. Behavior fully preserved.

tasks.title: Run multi-dimensional code review via sub-agents (logic, security, architecture, traceability)
tasks.completed_by: Code review completed. Coverage 100% for new tool. resolveTask refactor verified. Logic, Security, Architecture, and Traceability all pass. Verdict: APPROVED.

wisdom.content: Found documentation gaps in README.md and CHANGELOG.md during hardening. adv_task_show was missing from tool lists.
